resources.string: All your memories are stored securely on your device by default. Sign up for a LogDate Account so you never lose your memories.
By importing your memories, you'll be able to see memories from your past.
Choose how you'd like to proceed:
Enter the following words from your recovery phrase to confirm you've written it down correctly.
Enter your 12-word recovery phrase to restore your encryption keys and decrypt your data.
I have written down my recovery phrase
I love coffee, hiking, and terrible movies...
Keep your memories safe and accessible across all your devices. LogDate Cloud syncs your entries, photos, and settings securely.
Let's start with what we should call you
LogDate needs access to your photos and videos before it can suggest memories to import.
We couldn't load your photos and videos right now.
We couldn't find any photos or videos to import on this device.
No passwords to remember. Use your device's biometric authentication (Face ID, Touch ID, or fingerprint) for secure, convenient access.
Our AI identified these as potentially meaningful memories based on visual content, timing, and context.
Ready to start your journaling journey!
Select an option above to continue
Tell us a bit about yourself!
We've found some photos and videos that might have special meaning to you. Select the ones you'd like to import.
We've taken the effort of finding some photos from your past. You can choose which ones get backed up.
What makes you, you? Share whatever feels right
Write these 12 words on paper and store them safely. You'll need them to recover your data if you lose your device.
You can always set up cloud sync later in Settings
You'll now get notifications when it's time to write in your journal.
Recovery phrase words can only contain letters.
Enter all 12 recovery words to continue.
Never share your recovery phrase with anyone
Store it in a safe place
Write it down on paper - don't save digitally
Your birthday unlocks something special: every year on your birthday, you'll get a personalized Rewind of your favorite memories. It also marks the very beginning of your story on your timeline.
Every year, relive your best moments in a personalized birthday celebration.
Your birthday marks the start of your personal timeline \u2014 the origin of your story.
LogDate learns when and how you like to capture memories, then gives you a gentle nudge at just the right moment.
If you leave a draft unfinished, we'll remind you so nothing gets lost.
On this day last year, something happened. We'll help you rediscover it.
Suggestions are generated entirely on your device.
Keep late nights on the right day
When you're up past midnight, LogDate can use your sleep data from Health Connect so an entry still lands on the day you meant.
Your day ends when you actually sleep
A 1 AM journal entry can still count as "today" if you haven't gone to bed yet.
LogDate can use Health Connect to place late-night entries on the day you were still living.
Use sleep data for better journaling boundaries
Grant access to sleep sessions so LogDate can tell when one journaling day actually ends and the next begins.
Install or update Health Connect first
This device can use sleep-based day boundaries, but Health Connect needs to finish installing or updating before LogDate can request sleep access.
We're seeing whether sleep-based day boundaries are available on this device.
Sleep data is only used to place your entries on the right day. LogDate isn't trying to track or coach your sleep.
LogDate can remember the places that matter to you \u2014 the coffee shop where you had that great conversation, the park where you watched the sunset. Build a timeline of everywhere you've been.
See everywhere you've been and the memories you made there, all stored privately on your device.
Your location data is stored locally on your device and is never shared without your explicit consent.
Imagine if you had a journal that grew with you and the people you cared about.
A new home for your memories.
Your Log is your personal timeline. Write things and add photos or even voice memos. Everything is private to you by default.
Create a journal for the people you care about — whether your climbing buddies, your crochet club, or your family. Even if they don't use LogDate, they can still join in and add stuff.
Every week, we'll give you a Wrapped for your everyday life. We'll even give you a year in review if you keep it up!
Write, photograph, or record something every day to keep it up.
We couldn't save your birthday right now.
We couldn't save your location preference right now.
We couldn't save your notification setup right now.
We couldn't save your recommendations setting right now.
We couldn't save your day boundary preference right now.
Max 10 GB of text, photos, videos, and voice notes. Photos and videos will be compressed in high quality (1080p).
Includes up to 1 TB of storage for text, photo, video, and voice notes. Photos and videos will be stored in original quality.
Get daily journal prompts with LogDate. Every day, you'll get a reminder to log something in your journal.
Get progress updates when exporting or restoring your data, so you always know when your memories are ready.
